title: The Broken Game
description: Everything you need to play TBS smoothly, bundled into one optimized modpack.
body:
Built around the broken script, this modpack bundles all the essential mods needed for a smooth and immersive TBS experience. No need to hunt down individual mods—everything is preselected and ready to go.

Features include performance improvements, zoom functionality, dynamic lighting, borderless fullscreen mode, model gap fixes, and improved advancements.
